scripts.preview:cf: opennextjs-cloudflare build --skipWranglerConfigCheck && node scripts/ensure-open-next-redirects.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.deploy:cf: opennextjs-cloudflare build --skipWranglerConfigCheck && node scripts/ensure-open-next-redirects.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.deploy:worker: opennextjs-cloudflare build --skipWranglerConfigCheck && node scripts/ensure-open-next-redirects.mjs && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.deploy.json
scripts.upload:cf: opennextjs-cloudflare build --skipWranglerConfigCheck && node scripts/ensure-open-next-redirects.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare upload
